title: Enable and disable the virtual touchpad in Windows
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Right-click the taskbar and then select Taskbar settings . Open Taskbar settings Tip: For touch screens, press and hold the taskbar and then select Taskbar settings .
In the Personalization > Taskbar window, under the System tray icons section, make sure Virtual Touchpad is switched On .
In the system tray section of the task bar, select the virtual touchpad icon. The system tray is located next to the time and date in the taskbar.
steps.caption: How to activate the virtual touchpad in Windows 11.
